name: Steve Martin
abilities: ★ First Growth — debuts in 2026, rooted in for Mike Harris. The field's only actual arborist: he tends the very trees the rest of us are hitting out from behind.
Reach. Six-foot-ten in the timber — needs no ladder, casts a shadow over the back nine, and has never once lost a ball above head height.
caption: Steve Martin · Truffle Hogs 🐗
